= Homotopy Type Theory =

Our main text is Egbert Rijke's "Introduction to Homotopy Type Theory", a
digital copy of which is available through the UoB Library. Other supplementary
sources include:
- The HoTT book
- Robert Harper's lectures

Once I have organised my new website and resources, I might also publish some
notes on the topic.

If you are interested in joining this reading group, please send me an email.
We have a Teams group to which I will add you.
